builderStatic.notes: Builder-static Carrd knowledge is shared across site packages and should be reused from approved repo-local canon, then refreshed only when Builder behavior itself is in doubt.

templateInstance.notes: Builder-side canonical bootstrap artifacts are stored for this site package: builder scan, DOM audit, style map, element tabs map, builder-only live plugin inventory, and repo sync diff. Published-site scan is still pending because the published URL is not yet confirmed in canon.

reason: Separate site package created because the live Builder URL did not match the existing main-template baseline; builder-side baseline is now captured, but published-site verification is still missing.
freshScanRequiredWhen: active Builder URL changes for this site package
plugin sync or deterministic audit is requested
meaningful template or plugin changes happen after the latest site scan
